channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Historic 1904 land grant in Kaloleni, Kilifi sparks modern ownership dispute
item.description: A 1904 land grant by King Edward VII to the Church Missionary Trust Association in Kaloleni, Kilifi County has become the centre of a bitter and long‑running land dispute. The 22‑acre parcel was given...

item.title: Oyo State Reports Lassa Fever Case at UCH, Emergency Measures Activated
item.description: Oyo State Government don confirm say one case of Lassa fever don show for University College Hospital (UCH), Ibadan. The patient na 44-year-old woman wey dey the hospital and she die on April 11, 2026...

item.title: Christine Fréchette Sworn in as Quebec’s 33rd Premier with Focus on Economy
item.description: Christine Fréchette, 55, will be sworn in today as Quebec’s 33rd premier, following her victory over Bernard Drainville for the leadership of the Coalition Avenir Québec (CAQ). A former business execu...

item.title: Booking.com data breach exposes customers to targeted booking scams
item.description: A recent data breach at travel booking platform Booking.com has raised concerns about a surge in so-called 'reservation hijack' scams. Hackers gained access to customer data, including names, email ad...

item.title: South Africa Secures Substantial Investment Commitments to Boost Economic Growth
item.description: South Africa is demonstrating renewed economic momentum through its Presidential investment mobilisation drive, launched by President Cyril Ramaphosa at the South Africa Investment Conference (SAIC). ...

item.title: Jada Pinkett Explains Her Decision to Admit Infidelity to Protect Will Smith
item.description: In a recent resurfaced video, actress Jada Pinkett Smith opened up about why she admitted to having an affair with musician August Alsina while married to Will Smith. She revealed that, despite people...

item.title: Roelf Meyer Appointed as South Africa’s Ambassador to the United States
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has officially appointed Roelf Meyer as South Africa's new ambassador to the United States. Meyer, 78, is a seasoned negotiator with a long history of political involvement, ...

item.title: Iran escalates naval threats while maintaining dialogue with US
item.description: Iran has intensified its warnings regarding potential disruptions to naval traffic through the strategic Strait of Hormuz, citing concerns over a possible U.S. blockade. Despite the heightened rhetori...

item.title: Mass Promotion of 2,121 Public School Teachers in Eastern Visayas under ECP System
item.description: A total of 2,121 public school teachers and school principals in Eastern Visayas have received promotions under the government’s Expanded Career Progression (ECP) system, aimed at strengthening the ed...

item.title: Winnipeg drivers respond with varied opinions on federal gas tax reduction
item.description: The recent federal gas tax cut has sparked diverse reactions among Winnipeg residents. Some drivers welcome the temporary relief at the pump, seeing it as a helpful measure to ease the financial burde...

item.title: NDIS Participants Express Concerns Over Legal Action and Systemic Issues
item.description: A recent article in Crikey, compiled from reader submissions, highlights growing frustration within the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS) community. Readers express concern about the increas...

item.title: Effective Strategies for IT Certification and Career Growth
item.description: For anybody wey dey look to move up for IT career, getting certified don become mandatory. Certifications from Microsoft, Cisco, and other tech giants dey show say you sabi your work well and fit hand...

item.title: Victoria Police investigating sexual assault complaint involving Katy Perry and Ruby Rose
item.description: Victoria Police have confirmed they are investigating pop star Katy Perry following sexual assault allegations made by Australian actor Ruby Rose. According to early reports, the allegations relate to...

item.title: Exploring Eco-Dystopian Fiction Across Asia and Africa
item.description: Environmental fiction, particularly eco-dystopian novels, is gaining prominence globally as authors envision speculative futures shaped by climate catastrophe and ecological degradation. In Asia, Chin...

item.title: Preparations Intensify for Union Cup Ahead of Zanzibar Kickoff
item.description: Preparations for the 2026 Union Cup football tournament are in full swing as all eight participating teams have confirmed their involvement. The competition will start on April 21 at the New Amaan Com...

item.title: Pakistan’s CDF Munir Travels to Tehran for Iran-US Mediation Talks
item.description: Chief of Defence Forces and Army Chief Field Marshal Asim Munir reached Tehran on Wednesday alongside a formal delegation and Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi, engaging with Iranian Foreign Minister Abb...

item.title: Olusi Endorses Hamzat as Potential Lagos Governor Successor for 2027
item.description: As we dey waka enter 2027 governorship race for Lagos, Tajudeen Olusi, wey be chairman of Lagos Governance Advisory Council (GAC) and close padi to President Bola Tinubu, don hint say Dr. Obafemi Hamz...

item.title: Ministry of Justice report reveals 179 mistaken prisoner releases in England and Wales, including lengthy periods at large and further offences
item.description: A new independent report by Dame Lynne Owens has exposed serious failings in the prison system, revealing that 179 prisoners were wrongly released in England and Wales in the year to March 2026. This ...

item.title: Global Allies Grapple with Economic Fallout as They Distance Themselves from Trump's Iran Conflict
item.description: As President Donald Trump’s administration pursues a military conflict with Iran, US allies are increasingly finding themselves in a precarious position. While they are largely refusing to directly pa...

item.title: Foster Child in Durban North Taken by Biological Mother Using Alleged Fake Court Order
item.description: In Durban North, a foster mother is seeking justice after her foster child was allegedly abducted by the biological mother, who does not have legal custody. The incident reportedly occurred when the b...
